---
title: "Urban Operations Scheduling and Decision Support"
domain: "water"
period: "2019-2024"
role: "Algorithm Lead / Co-Algorithm Lead"
problem: "Optimize scheduling and service-level compliance under demand uncertainty and noisy measurements in an operational data environment."
method: "Forecasting and scheduling workflow with demand prediction, mathematical scheduling, configurable rule sets, and staged update support."
outcome: "Peak energy reduced (~10%), pump switching reduced (~20%), and pressure compliance improved (~3%)."
status: "deployed"
confidentiality: "public-safe"
selected: true
toc: false
---

::: {.project-safe-note}
Public-safe evidence only: figures are selected from deployment and model outputs without sensitive operations records.
:::

## System Context (One Plant + Two Stations)

The deployment focuses on a one-plant-two-stations urban service scenario where scheduling decisions must balance service quality, energy cost, and operational stability.

<div class="project-figure-card">
<img src="/assets/images/projects/water/water_demo_area_map.png" alt="Demonstration area map for one-plant-two-stations water dispatch">
<p>Demonstration-area map for South City Water Plant with Fuxing and Renmin Square pumping stations.</p>
<p class="project-figure-caption-cn">中文图注：黄浦示范区“一厂两站”供水区域示意图。</p>
</div>

## Model & Scheduling Framework

<div class="project-figure-card">
<img src="/assets/images/projects/water/water_method_framework.png" alt="Water dispatch method framework from multi-source sensing to scheduling generation">
<p>Framework from multi-source sensing and event triggers to robust dispatch-plan generation.</p>
<p class="project-figure-caption-cn">中文图注：多源感知-事件触发-调度方案生成的方法框架。</p>
</div>

- Forecasting and scheduling workflow connecting demand and pressure estimation with operational decisions.
- Constraint-aware scheduling with operator-configurable rule sets.
- Deployment-ready integration with dashboard-based review and fallback strategy options.

## Forecast Performance Evidence

<div class="project-figure-card">
<img src="/assets/images/projects/water/water_pressure_forecast_example.png" alt="Pressure forecasting example with MAPE shown on figure">
<p>Pressure forecasting example with low MAPE under full-period operational data.</p>
<p class="project-figure-caption-cn">中文图注：压力全时段预测示例图（图中包含 MAPE 指标）。</p>
</div>

## Dispatch Platform in Operation

::: {.project-figure-grid-2}
<div class="project-figure-card">
<img src="/assets/images/projects/water/water_dispatch_dashboard.png" alt="Operational scheduling dashboard">
<p>Production dashboard for real-time scheduling status, service map, and execution tracking.</p>
<p class="project-figure-caption-cn">中文图注：供水智能调度主界面，包含压力热力分布与执行日志。</p>
</div>

<div class="project-figure-card">
<img src="/assets/images/projects/water/water_dispatch_scoring.png" alt="Dispatch scoring and adoption evaluation panel">
<p>Dispatch-scoring panel supporting operation-quality assessment and strategy adoption review.</p>
<p class="project-figure-caption-cn">中文图注：调度评分界面，用于评估指令准确性、压力达标率与能耗表现。</p>
</div>
:::

## Measured Impact

::: {.project-evidence-table}
| Metric | Reported change |
|---|---:|
| Peak energy consumption | ~10% reduction |
| Pump switching frequency | ~20% reduction |
| Pressure compliance | ~3% improvement |
| Operational mode | 7x24 continuous dispatch |
:::

- Improved service-level stability with lower actuation burden.
- Better operator interpretability through dashboard and scoring modules.
- Reusable strategy templates for recurring operating patterns.
